column4: A data product type describing instrumental response functions for calibration and analysis.
Geometric area of the telescope and/or instrument reduced by efficiency factors such as reflectivity and vignetting, among other effects
Telescope/instrument effective area combined with detector quantum efficiency as a function of energy.
Rate of residual events that are not from the expected source type.  For instance, in a neutrino instrument, it measures the residual cosmic ray atmospheric events.
Probability density function of detecting an event with an energy estimator given the true energy of the event.
Probability density function of spatial/angular spreading of incident photons from a point source caused by the instrument (detector and/or mirror and/or analysis)
Probability density function mapping from energy space into detector pulse height (or position) space.
